goal: Move the lower-coupling factory implementation files under the factory namespace while preserving top-level imports through compatibility wrappers.
constraints: Preserve existing import paths for callers and tests
Leave scaffold.py in place for a later tranche
behavioral_changes: The real implementations of gap analysis and category templates now live under chip_labs.chip_factory.
The old top-level factory modules now act as compatibility wrappers.
CLI category-template imports now consistently route through the factory namespace.
verification_targets: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.gap_analyzer import improve_chip; from chip_labs.category_templates import apply_template; from chip_labs.chip_factory.gap_analyzer import improve_chip as moved_improve_chip; from chip_labs.chip_factory.category_templates import apply_template as moved_apply_template; import chip_labs.cli; print('factory-move-imports-ok')"
follow_up: Move scaffold.py only after confirming the remaining factory callers are cleanly routed through the namespace.
Continue moving lower-coupling modules before the central scaffold path.
